name: Individual Baked Lobster Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 2 tablespoons of butter in a saucepan. Add sherry and boil for 1 minute.
2. Add lobster meat to the pan and let stand.
3. In a separate saucepan, melt 3 tablespoons of butter. Add flour and stir until bubbles form.
4. Gradually stir in cream and wine, drained from the lobster. Return to heat and cook until smooth and thick.
5. Remove from heat and carefully beat egg yolks.
6. Stir yolk mixture into the sauce, one tablespoon at a time, ensuring well combined.
7. Heat over hot water in a double boiler for about 3 minutes without letting the water boil or the sauce curdle.
8. Add lobster meat to the sauce and pour into a small deep dish pie plate.
9. Sprinkle with topping ingredients.
10. Bake slowly at 300°F (150°C) oven for 10 minutes.
